home.heroSubtitle: Ihahiro connects you with farmers and traders near you. Fresh, trusted food that reaches you wherever you are.
home.heroSearchHelp: Use both fields to find nearby offers faster, even on slower connections.
home.featuredSubtitle: Fresh produce from trusted farmers across Rwanda.
home.featuredError: Featured listings could not load right now. Please try again.
home.liveSubtitle: Fresh offers from farmers near you
home.liveMarketSubtitle: Latest quantities, locations, and prices at a glance.
home.liveError: We couldn't refresh the latest market activity right now.
home.howSubtitle: Three simple steps to trade with confidence
home.step1Body: Post photos, quantity, and price in minutes.
home.step2Body: Search by product and location on any device.
home.step3Body: Call or message directly, then arrange delivery.
home.farmerBody: Reach more buyers, show quality with photos, and keep control of your price.
home.buyerBody: Source local produce, compare listings, and contact sellers quickly.
home.buyersSectionTitle: Buy local produce with more confidence
home.buyersSectionBody: Compare price, quantity, and location before you call so every trip and every franc counts.
home.buyersPointOne: See listing quantities and pricing at a glance.
home.buyersPointTwo: Search across nearby districts before arranging delivery.
home.buyersPointThree: Contact sellers directly by phone, WhatsApp, or message.
home.sellersSectionBody: Post produce clearly, reach more buyers, and keep conversations moving without complicated tools.
home.sellersPointOne: Show your harvest with clean cards and simple listing details.
home.sellersPointTwo: Reach buyers searching by produce or Rwanda location.
home.sellersPointThree: Use one account for buyer and seller workflows as the platform grows.
home.trustSectionTitle: Built for Rwanda's real trading routes
home.trustSectionBody: Ihahiro keeps search, comparison, and seller contact simple so buyers and farmers can move faster on mobile devices.
home.trustPanelTitle: District-ready browsing for everyday agricultural trade
home.trustSearchBody: Start with familiar places like Kigali, Musanze, Huye, or Rubavu and narrow from there.
home.trustContactBody: Once you find the right listing, call or chat with the seller without extra steps.
home.trustBandwidthBody: Lean cards, lazy media, and simple forms keep the experience usable on lower-end phones.
home.trustSafetyBody: The frontend is structured for clear listing details, transparent pricing, and moderation-ready workflows as backend features expand.
home.whyNearbyBody: Search listings close to your home or business anywhere in Rwanda.
home.whyConnectBody: Reach farmers and buyers directly by phone, WhatsApp, or message.
home.whyPricesBody: Compare transparent per-kg prices before you commit.
home.whyFarmersBody: Buy local and help farming families grow sustainable income.
home.bottomCtaBody: Sign up or log in to discover fresh produce sourced directly from our farmers.

listings.title: Market
listings.subtitle: Discover harvests across Rwanda
listings.ctaSellBody: List your harvest and reach buyers today.

listingDetail.reportQuestion: Did you notice a problem with this listing?

postHarvest.subtitle: Share your produce on the market and connect with buyers near you.
postHarvest.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your produce (type, quality, delivery details...)
postHarvest.photosHelp: Add clear photos that show your produce (up to 6)
postHarvest.tipPhoto: Use clear photos that show the actual produce.
postHarvest.tipQuality: Describe the type and quality of the produce clearly.
postHarvest.tipPrice: Set a price that matches the current market.
postHarvest.helpBody: If you have a question or need support, message us or call us.
postHarvest.loginModalBody: You need to log in first before publishing your harvest. Continue to the login page?
postHarvest.newCategoryModalBody: Enter the name of the category (e.g. Vegetables, Fruits)
postHarvest.newProductModalBody: Enter the name of your produce under this category
postHarvest.loginRequired: Sign in first to publish your harvest.
postHarvest.requiredFieldsError: Fill in all required fields before sending your listing.
postHarvest.photoLimitError: You can upload up to {count} photos.
postHarvest.photoSizeError: Each photo must be 5MB or smaller.
postHarvest.photoTypeError: Only PNG and JPG images are supported.
postHarvest.submitError: We couldn't publish your harvest right now. Please try again.
postHarvest.securityBody: Your personal and produce information is protected. We do not share it without permission.

howPage.intro: Ihahiro connects farmers and buyers in a simple, fast, and trusted way.
howPage.stepsTitle: How Ihahiro works in 4 simple steps
howPage.step1Body: A farmer adds available produce with details and photos.
howPage.step2Body: Buyers search for produce near them or anywhere else.
howPage.step3Body: Start a conversation by phone or WhatsApp.
howPage.step4Body: Agree on pickup, delivery, and payment together.
howPage.benefitFastBody: Search, find, and contact the right person easily.
howPage.benefitNearbyBody: Find nearby produce and reduce transport costs.
howPage.benefitInfoBody: Farmers and buyers share information that makes trade reliable.
howPage.benefitTrustBody: Important information is protected, and the service is built on trust.
howPage.farmersBody: Post your produce, reach more buyers, and sell with confidence.
howPage.buyersBody: Find quality produce, compare prices, and contact farmers quickly.
howPage.ctaBody: Start using Ihahiro today to find or sell your produce.

aboutPage.intro1: Ihahiro is a platform built in Rwanda to connect farmers and buyers through modern technology.
aboutPage.intro2: Our goal is to add value to agriculture, help farmers access reliable markets, and support sustainable trade.
aboutPage.goalConnectBody: Connect farmers and buyers in a simple way.
aboutPage.goalValueBody: Promote agriculture and increase the value of produce.
aboutPage.goalGrowthBody: Support household and national economic growth.
aboutPage.goalSustainableBody: Provide a reliable, trusted, and lasting market.
aboutPage.approachTechBody: We use technology that is simple and accessible to everyone.
aboutPage.approachMarketBody: We provide information that helps farmers and buyers make better decisions.
aboutPage.approachPartnersBody: We work with different partners to strengthen agriculture.
aboutPage.approachSafetyBody: We provide trusted services and protect user information.
aboutPage.teamBody: Our team brings experience in technology, agriculture, finance, and community development to make Ihahiro useful for everyone.

benefits.buyerSpeedBody: Compare produce, quantity, and location before calling a seller.
benefits.sellerReachBody: Give your produce a clearer home online so more buyers can discover it.
benefits.lightweightBody: Simple forms and lean pages help the app stay usable on mobile networks.

roles.buyerBody: Browse produce, compare listings, save searches, and contact sellers quickly.
roles.sellerBody: Publish harvest, respond to leads, and manage listing activity from one place.

validation.identifierInvalid: Enter a valid email or phone number

login.title: Sign in to keep trading moving
login.subtitle: Manage listings, conversations, and saved activity from one lightweight account.
login.submitError: We couldn't sign you in right now. Please check your details and try again.
login.sideBody: Whether you are buying produce or selling harvest, your account keeps the marketplace simple, fast, and ready for real backend integration.

register.title: Join Ihahiro as a buyer, seller, or both
register.subtitle: Set up one account now and keep your marketplace identity ready for listings, saved searches, delivery requests, and chat.
register.privacyNote: Your information is kept ready for secure sign-in and future marketplace features like saved searches, chats, and delivery requests.
register.submitError: We couldn't create your account right now. Please review your information and try again.
register.sideTitle: Start with a clear marketplace profile
register.sideBody: Ihahiro is designed for people who may buy, sell, or do both. Choose the roles that fit you today and we'll keep the UI ready for more workflows.

footer.mission: Connecting Rwandan farmers and buyers with a modern, trustworthy marketplace.
